asOfNote: Auto-fetched fields are refreshed at build time when an AGSI_API_KEY secret is set; everything else is updated manually.

scenarioProbsByPrice.comment: Probabilities depend on the current Brent price. Each scenario maps price bands (tested in order) to a probability range.

methodScenarios.name: Swift (<1mo from now)
methodScenarios.rationale: Qatar-mediated talks ongoing but ceasefire violated this week. IEA assumes Hormuz reopens gradually from June. ~164M of 400M IEA barrels already deployed.

methodScenarios.name: Extended (3-6mo more)
methodScenarios.rationale: Base case. War in month 3; another 3-6 months likely before sustained ceasefire. World Bank baseline of $86/bbl avg 2026 implicit in this scenario.

methodScenarios.name: Prolonged (6-12mo more)
methodScenarios.rationale: Iran caught mining Hormuz this week is a bad signal. Russia exploiting leverage but hasn't cut gas yet. Through 2026 into early 2027.

methodScenarios.name: Catastrophic (12+mo more)
methodScenarios.rationale: Slightly lower than at war start. 3 months in without full regional escalation. Trump under domestic pressure from $4+ gas. World Bank upside scenario ($115 avg) ≈ the lower bound of this case.
